user_message: Working on Parnell Aerospace's account health. Got the exec meeting notes -- help me run the hygiene check.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>

Date: 2024-03-13 17:38 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace account health

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Date: 2024-02-03 08:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: account health Issue at Parnell Aerospace

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 09:25 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-C trap (Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-C failure mode (Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-C -- Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email
